text_original: I REFUSE to download this game after getting an ad that was LITERALLY 5 seconds of the same ad 11 times before I could get back to what I WANTED to play
text_zh: 我拒绝下载这个游戏，因为我刚才看了一个广告，居然把同一个广告连续放了11遍，每遍5秒，才让我回到我想玩的游戏。
reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience! We understand how frustrating repetitive ads can be. Please know that ad delivery is often managed by third-party networks, but we are working to optimize this. If you encounter this again, please report it to support@fantachat.ai so we can investigate. We hope you'll give us a chance!
reply_zh: 你好，对于这次不愉快的情感体验，我深表歉意！我们理解重复广告是多么令人沮丧。请知悉，广告投放通常由第三方网络管理，但我们正在努力优化这一点。如果您再次遇到这种情况，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 进行举报，以便我们展开调查。希望您能再给我们一次机会！
